note: Numeric-predicate-gated re-review chain. The resolve gate is a LITERAL BOOLEAN on structured data (revised value satisfies the hold-time predicate) — it cannot degenerate to UNCERTAIN because there is no judgment left. Honest boundary: the magnitude objection is predicate-gated (structurally prevented); the inferential-integrity objection is fresh-judgment-only (detectable, not prevented). Enforcement is marked per-objection, not one blanket level.

objections.evidenceLine: structural_fact: verified 7d move ≈ +41.0%; thesis claims "+186% parabolic rally".

objections.reasoning: Thesis invokes 'climactic volume exhaustion' not grounded in the cited data.
